Notes: Pico H has pre-soldered headers - easier for breadboard use
Must be a data cable not charge-only
Ask staff for "solderless" or "prototyping" breadboard - not "Perma-Proto"

Purpose: Mute / Vol down / Vol up inputs
Notes: Panel-mount or breadboard tactile both work
4-pin I2C version (VCC/GND/SDA/SCL) - not the 7-pin SPI version

Purpose: Backup if buttons don't fit breadboard directly
Notes: Only needed if using panel-mount buttons with long leads
Excludes cardboard and optional alligator clips
